hallucinations.description: The paper cites two nonexistent 2025 papers (DACA by Luo et al. and CCPS by Khanmohammadi et al.) with fabricated arXiv IDs (arXiv:2505.16690 and arXiv:2505.21772). These references cannot be found in any academic database and appear to be AI-generated fabrications.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: 'Luo, Y., et al. (2025). Your pre-trained LLM is secretly an unsupervised confidence calibrator. arXiv preprint arXiv:2505.16690.' and 'Khanmohammadi, S., et al. (2025). Calibrating LLM confidence by probing perturbed representation stability. arXiv preprint arXiv:2505.21772.' Also mentioned in Abstract and Section 2.1.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations were found: specifically nonexistent citations to fabricated 2025 papers. However, the experimental results, methodology descriptions, tables, and statistical findings accurately match the provided code execution logs and output files (no faked results or methodology hallucinations).
